title: cremanthodium pseudo-oblongatum
intro: Cremanthodium pseudo-oblongatum, also known as the yellow autumn daisy, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Cremanthodium pseudo-oblongatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
